creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Guilherme Salazar from comment #49)

No, no particular tests. Just check dmesg output for lines with "lock order reversal". There might be some from other subsystems but if there is nothing with psm.c in it - it's OK. Also if kernel does not panic - it means there are no violations of INVARIANTS checks. 

Thanks for testing it.
